en_title: 'A Great Foundation for Our Upcoming Projects in This Universe' — CD Projekt Hails Cyberpunk 2077 as It Hits an Incredible 40 Million Copies Sold
subtitle: 夜之城翻身仗
opus_summary: CD Projekt宣布《赛博朋克2077》销量已达4000万份，比去年11月公布3500万份时又增加500万。公司称这为《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》和《赛博朋克2》等后续项目打下基础。

paragraphs.en: CD Projekt has hailed the success of Cyberpunk 2077 , announcing it has now hit the 40 million copies sold mark. That’s up 5 million copies from the last time the developer announced Cyberpunk 2077 sales , back in November when it hit 35 million.
paragraphs.cn: CD Projekt称赞《赛博朋克2077》的成功，宣布本作销量已经达到4000万份。相比这家开发商上一次在去年11月公布《赛博朋克2077》销量达到3500万份时，又增加了500万份。

paragraphs.en: It’s also one of the most dramatic comebacks in video game history. Cyberpunk 2077 suffered a disastrous launch back in 2020, with CD Projekt accused of misleading consumers with its pre-release marketing materials. The game came out in such a terrible state, particularly on consoles, that Sony pulled it from the PlayStation Store.
paragraphs.cn: 这也是电子游戏史上最戏剧性的翻身之一。《赛博朋克2077》在2020年经历了灾难性首发，CD Projekt被指控用发售前营销材料误导消费者。游戏推出时状态糟糕，尤其是在主机上，以至于索尼将其从PlayStation Store下架。

paragraphs.en: CD Projekt spent years working to improve Cyberpunk 2077, rebuilding trust with its fans. While most consider the studio to have been successful in that, co-CEO Michał Nowakowski recently said he thought CD Projekt had yet to complete a "full redemption arc."
paragraphs.cn: CD Projekt花了多年时间改进《赛博朋克2077》，重建粉丝信任。虽然多数人认为工作室在这方面已经成功，但联席CEO Michał Nowakowski最近表示，他认为CD Projekt还没有完成「完整救赎篇章」。

paragraphs.en: "40 million copies sold shows the incredible, lasting strength of Cyberpunk 2077 and is a testament to what CD Projekt does best — creating high-quality, immersive stories that keep players returning for years,” Nowakowski said in a social media post published on July 3 . “It's a great foundation for our upcoming projects in this universe, including the Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 anime arriving this fall.”
paragraphs.cn: Nowakowski在7月3日发布的一篇社交媒体帖子中说：「4000万份销量展现了《赛博朋克2077》令人难以置信且持久的力量，也证明了CD Projekt最擅长的事情：创造高质量、沉浸式的故事，让玩家多年后仍然不断回归。这为我们在这个宇宙中的后续项目打下了很好的基础，包括今年秋季到来的动画《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》。」

paragraphs.en: That’s not just a nod to the hotly anticipated Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 , but to Cyberpunk 2 , which 163 people were working on as of the end of April. While we know little about Cyberpunk 2, Cyberpunk creator Mike Pondsmith teased some details when he was asked about the scope of his involvement with what was then known as Project Orion, back at the Digital Dragons 2025 conference.
paragraphs.cn: 这不仅是在提到备受期待的《赛博朋克：边缘行者2》，也是在提到《赛博朋克2》。截至4月底，已有163人在参与后者。虽然我们对《赛博朋克2》了解不多，但在Digital Dragons 2025大会上，当被问到自己参与当时名为Project Orion的项目有多深时，《赛博朋克》创作者Mike Pondsmith曾透露了一些细节。

paragraphs.en: Pondsmith admitted he wasn’t as involved this time around, but said he had reviewed scripts and had been to CD Projekt to check out the ongoing work. “Last week I was wandering around talking to different departments, and seeing what they had, ‘Oh look, this is the new cyberware, what do you think?’ ‘Oh yeah, that’s pretty good, that works here.’"
paragraphs.cn: Pondsmith承认，这一次自己的参与程度没有那么深，但他说自己已经看过剧本，也去过CD Projekt查看正在进行的工作。「上周我到处走，和不同部门聊天，看他们手里有什么，『哦，看，这是新义体，你觉得怎么样？』『哦，是啊，很不错，这里能用。』」

paragraphs.en: Pondsmith added that the sequel features a brand new city in addition to the Night City we know from Cyberpunk 2077. Pondsmith described this new city as “like Chicago gone wrong.”
paragraphs.cn: Pondsmith补充说，续作除了我们从《赛博朋克2077》中熟悉的夜之城之外，还会有一座全新城市。Pondsmith形容这座新城市「像是出了问题的芝加哥」。

paragraphs.en: “I spent a lot of time talking to one of the environment guys, and he was explaining how the new place in Orion, because there’s another city we visit — I’m not telling you any more than that but there’s another city we visit. And Night City is still there. But I remember looking at it and going, yeah I understand the feel you’re going for this, and this really does work. And it doesn’t feel like Blade Runner, it feels more like Chicago gone wrong. I said, ‘Yeah, I can see this working.'”
paragraphs.cn: 「我花了很多时间和一位环境设计人员交谈，他在解释Orion里的新地点，因为我们会去另一座城市。我不会告诉你更多，但我们会去另一座城市。夜之城仍然在那里。但我记得我看着它，心想，是的，我明白你想要的感觉，这确实有效。它不像《银翼杀手》，更像是出了问题的芝加哥。我说，『对，我能看出这行得通。』」

paragraphs.en: In September last year, speaking with IGN while promoting his movie Good Fortune, Keanu Reeves said that he wanted to be part of the Cyberpunk sequel . “Absolutely. I’d love to play Johnny Silverhand again," Reeves said when asked if he’d be interested in revisiting his legendary rockstar terrorist character in Cyberpunk 2. Pondsmith later said , and has told the much-loved actor: “contact me.”
paragraphs.cn: 去年9月，Keanu Reeves在宣传自己的电影《Good Fortune》时接受IGN采访，表示自己想参与《赛博朋克》续作。当被问到是否有兴趣在《赛博朋克2》中再次饰演传奇摇滚恐怖分子Johnny Silverhand时，Reeves说：「当然。我很想再次饰演Johnny Silverhand。」Pondsmith后来也表示，并告诉这位深受喜爱的演员：「联系我。」

paragraphs.en: It sounds like we'll have to wait some time to find out. CD Projekt is of course focusing on The Witcher 4, and Nowakowski has suggested Cyberpunk 2 won’t be out until at least 2030.
paragraphs.cn: 听起来我们还得等一段时间才能知道结果。CD Projekt当然正在专注于《巫师4》，Nowakowski也暗示《赛博朋克2》至少要到2030年才会推出。

paragraphs.en: While Cyberpunk 2077 is a huge success, The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt is well ahead of it with a whopping 65 million sold. It's getting a brand new expansion next year.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然《赛博朋克2077》取得巨大成功，但《巫师3：狂猎》仍以惊人的6500万份销量遥遥领先。它明年还会获得一个全新扩展内容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上通过@wyp100找到他，也可以通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系Wesley，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
